title: Qorvo Inc. (QRVO) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) valuation of Qorvo, incorporating its cyclicality and long-term 5G/IoT tailwinds.

fcfGrowth.title: Projected FCF Growth
fcfGrowth.rationale: 8.4% projected annual growth, aligning with recent performance and secular trends in RF complexity and content expansion.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate
discountRate.rationale: 11.0%, a higher rate applied due to cyclical consumer electronics exposure and significant customer concentration risk.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale: 3.0%, reflecting long-term growth in connectivity needs outpacing general GDP.
